purpose: Creator Alpha provenance inventory for redistribution decisions. It records evidence, not legal conclusions.

releasePolicy.normalValidation: Inventory structure and coverage are required for development and CI.
releasePolicy.strictReleaseValidation: Every tracked file is a source-archive release input. Every redistributable asset, workflow, screenshot, planning document, and third-party notice entry must be approved before a public release.

entries.releaseAction: Keep copyright and license notices with source distributions.

entries.evidence: No repository-local chain of title has been recorded for all sample assets, prompts, and workflow material.
entries.releaseAction: Before public redistribution, review each included asset/workflow, record its source and permitted license, then change this status to approved.

entries.evidence: Starter content may include local or generated material whose redistribution rights have not been reviewed.
entries.releaseAction: Do not treat starter assets, generated assets, prompt packs, recipes, or workflow files as cleared until their source and redistribution terms are recorded.

entries.evidence: The checked-in screenshot has no recorded source and redistribution decision.
entries.releaseAction: Replace with a repository-owned capture or document approval before publication.

entries.evidence: The tracked planning documents have no repository-local source or redistribution record.
entries.releaseAction: Before public source distribution, record the author/source and permitted redistribution basis for each document, or remove it from the release commit.

entries.evidence: The lockfile identifies dependencies but is not a complete redistributed-notice record.
entries.releaseAction: Before shipping a packaged editor, review the resolved production dependency notices and update THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md with the required attributions and license texts or references.
